full_name: Non-alloy quality/quenched-and-tempered steel C45, material number 1.0503 (AISI 1045 equivalent)
scope: Medium-carbon unalloyed engineering steel supplied in normalized or quenched-and-tempered condition. Moderately high strength and wear resistance; used for shafts, gears, axles, bolts and general machined parts.
license_note: composition from free manufacturer datasheet (Saarstahl) and independent references, not the copyrighted DIN/EN document text
